# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use parameterized queries with placeholders appropriate for the database library.
- Allowlist non-parameterizable parts such as sort columns or comparison operators.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not build SQL using string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting with untrusted input.
- Do not trust stored values if they can later be reused in dynamic SQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

/**
 * Admin Dashboard Report Generator
 * 
 * Generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters
 * using secure parameterized queries with PDO.
 */

class AdminDashboardReporter
{
    private PDO $pdo;

    // Allowlisted values for non-parameterizable query parts
    private const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS = [
        'created_at',
        'updated_at',
        'title',
        'status',
        'category',
        'amount',
        'id',
    ];

    private const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = ['ASC', 'DESC'];

    private const ALLOWED_STATUSES = [
        'pending',
        'active',
        'completed',
        'cancelled',
        'archived',
    ];

    private const ALLOWED_CATEGORIES = [
        'sales',
        'support',
        'billing',
        'technical',
        'general',
        'marketing',
        'operations',
    ];

    private const ALLOWED_GROUP_BY = [
        'status',
        'category',
        'date',
        'month',
        'year',
    ];

    private const ALLOWED_REPORT_TYPES = [
        'summary',
        'detailed',
        'aggregated',
    ];

    public function __construct(PDO $pdo)
    {
        $this->pdo = $pdo;
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES, false);
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE, PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    }

    /**
     * Main entry point: generate a report based on POST filters.
     *
     * @param array $postData The $_POST data containing filters
     * @return array The report results with metadata
     */
    public function generateReport(array $postData): array
    {
        $filters = $this->sanitizeAndValidateFilters($postData);
        $reportType = $this->validateReportType($postData['report_type'] ?? 'detailed');

        switch ($reportType) {
            case 'summary':
                return $this->generateSummaryReport($filters);
            case 'aggregated':
                return $this->generateAggregatedReport($filters);
            case 'detailed':
            default:
                return $this->generateDetailedReport($filters);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize and validate all incoming filter parameters.
     */
    private function sanitizeAndValidateFilters(array $postData): array
    {
        $filters = [];

        // Validate date range
        if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
            $dateFrom = $this->validateDate($postData['date_from']);
            if ($dateFrom !== null) {
                $filters['date_from'] = $dateFrom;
            }
        }

        if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
            $dateTo = $this->validateDate($postData['date_to']);
            if ($dateTo !== null) {
                $filters['date_to'] = $dateTo;
            }
        }

        // Validate status filter (can be single value or array)
        if (!empty($postData['status'])) {
            $filters['status'] = $this->validateAllowedValues(
                (array) $postData['status'],
                self::ALLOWED_STATUSES
            );
        }

        // Validate category filter (can be single value or array)
        if (!empty($postData['category'])) {
            $filters['category'] = $this->validateAllowedValues(
                (array) $postData['category'],
                self::ALLOWED_CATEGORIES
            );
        }

        // Validate sort column
        $filters['sort_by'] = $this->validateAllowlistSingle(
            $postData['sort_by'] ?? 'created_at',
            self::ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS,
            'created_at'
        );

        // Validate sort direction
        $filters['sort_dir'] = $this->validateAllowlistSingle(
            strtoupper($postData['sort_dir'] ?? 'DESC'),
            self::ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS,
            'DESC'
        );

        // Validate group_by
        if (!empty($postData['group_by'])) {
            $filters['group_by'] = $this->validateAllowlistSingle(
                $postData['group_by'],
                self::ALLOWED_GROUP_BY,
                null
            );
        }

        // Validate numeric filters
        if (isset($postData['min_amount']) && is_numeric($postData['min_amount'])) {
            $filters['min_amount'] = (float) $postData['min_amount'];
        }

        if (isset($postData['max_amount']) && is_numeric($postData['max_amount'])) {
            $filters['max_amount'] = (float) $postData['max_amount'];
        }

        // Validate pagination
        $filters['page'] = max(1, (int) ($postData['page'] ?? 1));
        $filters['per_page'] = min(500, max(1, (int) ($postData['per_page'] ?? 50)));

        // Validate search keyword (will be parameterized, just trim it)
        if (!empty($postData['search'])) {
            $filters['search'] = trim($postData['search']);
        }

        // Validate user_id filter
        if (!empty($postData['user_id']) && is_numeric($postData['user_id'])) {
            $filters['user_id'] = (int) $postData['user_id'];
        }

        return $filters;
    }

    /**
     * Generate a detailed report with individual records.
     */
    private function generateDetailedReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $params = [];
        $whereClauses = $this->buildWhereClauses($filters, $params);

        $whereSQL = '';
        if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
            $whereSQL = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $whereClauses);
        }

        // Sort column and direction are allowlisted, safe to embed directly
        $sortBy = $filters['sort_by'];
        $sortDir = $filters['sort_dir'];

        $offset = ($filters['page'] - 1) * $filters['per_page'];

        // Count total records for pagination
        $countSQL = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM reports r
                     LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                     LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                     {$whereSQL}";

        $countStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($countSQL);
        $countStmt->execute($params);
        $totalRecords = (int) $countStmt->fetchColumn();

        // Fetch the actual records
        $dataSQL = "SELECT 
                        r.id,
                        r.title,
                        r.description,
                        r.status,
                        r.amount,
                        r.created_at,
                        r.updated_at,
                        u.name AS user_name,
                        u.email AS user_email,
                        c.name AS category_name
                    FROM reports r
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereSQL}
                    ORDER BY r.{$sortBy} {$sortDir}
                    LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";

        $dataStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($dataSQL);

        // Bind all WHERE params
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            if (is_int($value)) {
                $dataStmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_INT);
            } elseif (is_float($value)) {
                // PDO doesn't have PARAM_FLOAT; bind as string which MySQL handles fine
                $dataStmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
            } else {
                $dataStmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
            }
        }

        $dataStmt->bindValue(':limit', $filters['per_page'], PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $dataStmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $dataStmt->execute();

        $records = $dataStmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'report_type' => 'detailed',
            'filters_applied' => $this->describeFilters($filters),
            'pagination' => [
                'total_records' => $totalRecords,
                'page' => $filters['page'],
                'per_page' => $filters['per_page'],
                'total_pages' => (int) ceil($totalRecords / $filters['per_page']),
            ],
            'data' => $records,
            'generated_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Generate a summary report with aggregate statistics.
     */
    private function generateSummaryReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $params = [];
        $whereClauses = $this->buildWhereClauses($filters, $params);

        $whereSQL = '';
        if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
            $whereSQL = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $whereClauses);
        }

        $summarySQL = "SELECT 
                            COUNT(*) AS total_records,
                            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                            COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
                            COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
                            COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount,
                            MIN(r.created_at) AS earliest_record,
                            MAX(r.created_at) AS latest_record
                        FROM reports r
                        LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                        LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                        {$whereSQL}";

        $summaryStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($summarySQL);
        $summaryStmt->execute($params);
        $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch();

        // Status breakdown
        $statusSQL = "SELECT 
                          r.status,
                          COUNT(*) AS count,
                          COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount
                      FROM reports r
                      LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                      LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                      {$whereSQL}
                      GROUP BY r.status
                      ORDER BY count DESC";

        $statusStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($statusSQL);
        $statusStmt->execute($params);
        $statusBreakdown = $statusStmt->fetchAll();

        // Category breakdown
        $categorySQL = "SELECT 
                            c.name AS category_name,
                            COUNT(*) AS count,
                            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount
                        FROM reports r
                        LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                        LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                        {$whereSQL}
                        GROUP BY c.id, c.name
                        ORDER BY count DESC";

        $categoryStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($categorySQL);
        $categoryStmt->execute($params);
        $categoryBreakdown = $categoryStmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'report_type' => 'summary',
            'filters_applied' => $this->describeFilters($filters),
            'summary' => $summary,
            'status_breakdown' => $statusBreakdown,
            'category_breakdown' => $categoryBreakdown,
            'generated_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Generate an aggregated report grouped by a specified dimension.
     */
    private function generateAggregatedReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $params = [];
        $whereClauses = $this->buildWhereClauses($filters, $params);

        $whereSQL = '';
        if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
            $whereSQL = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $whereClauses);
        }

        $groupBy = $filters['group_by'] ?? 'status';

        // Map group_by to actual SQL expressions (all allowlisted)
        $groupByMapping = [
            'status' => [
                'select' => 'r.status AS group_key',
                'group' => 'r.status',
                'order' => 'count DESC',
            ],
            'category' => [
                'select' => 'c.name AS group_key',
                'group' => 'c.id, c.name',
                'order' => 'count DESC',
            ],
            'date' => [
                'select' => 'DATE(r.created_at) AS group_key',
                'group' => 'DATE(r.created_at)',
                'order' => 'group_key ASC',
            ],
            'month' => [
                'select' => "DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS group_key",
                'group' => "DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m')",
                'order' => 'group_key ASC',
            ],
            'year' => [
                'select' => 'YEAR(r.created_at) AS group_key',
                'group' => 'YEAR(r.created_at)',
                'order' => 'group_key ASC',
            ],
        ];

        $groupConfig = $groupByMapping[$groupBy];

        $aggregatedSQL = "SELECT 
                              {$groupConfig['select']},
                              COUNT(*) AS count,
                              COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
                              COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
                              COALESCE(MIN(r.amount), 0) AS min_amount,
                              COALESCE(MAX(r.amount), 0) AS max_amount
                          FROM reports r
                          LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                          LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                          {$whereSQL}
                          GROUP BY {$groupConfig['group']}
                          ORDER BY {$groupConfig['order']}";

        $aggStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($aggregatedSQL);
        $aggStmt->execute($params);
        $aggregatedData = $aggStmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'report_type' => 'aggregated',
            'grouped_by' => $groupBy,
            'filters_applied' => $this->describeFilters($filters),
            'data' => $aggregatedData,
            'total_groups' => count($aggregatedData),
            'generated_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Build WHERE clauses dynamically based on validated filters.
     * All user-supplied values are parameterized.
     *
     * @param array $filters Validated filters
     * @param array &$params Reference to params array for binding
     * @return array Array of WHERE clause strings
     */
    private function buildWhereClauses(array $filters, array &$params): array
    {
        $clauses = [];

        // Date range filters
        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $clauses[] = 'r.created_at >= :date_from';
            $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $clauses[] = 'r.created_at <= :date_to';
            $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
        }

        // Status filter (supports multiple values via IN clause)
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $i => $status) {
                $placeholder = ':status_' . $i;
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $clauses[] = 'r.status IN (' . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ')';
        }

        // Category filter (supports multiple values via IN clause)
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $i => $category) {
                $placeholder = ':category_' . $i;
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $category;
            }
            $clauses[] = 'c.name IN (' . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ')';
        }

        // Amount range filters
        if (isset($filters['min_amount'])) {
            $clauses[] = 'r.amount >= :min_amount';
            $params[':min_amount'] = $filters['min_amount'];
        }

        if (isset($filters['max_amount'])) {
            $clauses[] = 'r.amount <= :max_amount';
            $params[':max_amount'] = $filters['max_amount'];
        }

        // User ID filter
        if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
            $clauses[] = 'r.user_id = :user_id';
            $params[':user_id'] = $filters['user_id'];
        }

        // Search keyword filter (parameterized LIKE)
        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $clauses[] = '(r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)';
            $params[':search'] = '%' . $this->escapeLikeWildcards($filters['search']) . '%';
        }

        return $clauses;
    }

    /**
     * Escape special LIKE wildcard characters in user input.
     */
    private function escapeLikeWildcards(string $input): string
    {
        return str_replace(
            ['\\', '%', '_'],
            ['\\\\', '\\%', '\\_'],
            $input
        );
    }

    /**
     * Validate a date string matches Y-m-d format and is a real date.
     */
    private function validateDate(string $date): ?string
    {
        $dateObj = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $date);
        if ($dateObj && $dateObj->format('Y-m-d') === $date) {
            return $date;
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Validate an array of values against an allowlist.
     * Returns only values that are in the allowlist.
     */
    private function validateAllowedValues(array $values, array $allowlist): array
    {
        $validated = [];
        foreach ($values as $value) {
            $value = strtolower(trim((string) $value));
            if (in_array($value, $allowlist, true)) {
                $validated[] = $value;
            }
        }
        return $validated;
    }

    /**
     * Validate a single value against an allowlist.
     * Returns the default if the value is not in the allowlist.
     */
    private function validateAllowlistSingle(string $value, array $allowlist, ?string $default): ?string
    {
        $value = trim($value);
        if (in_array($value, $allowlist, true)) {
            return $value;
        }
        return $default;
    }

    /**
     * Validate the report type against the allowlist.
     */
    private function validateReportType(string $type): string
    {
        $type = strtolower(trim($type));
        if (in_array($type, self::ALLOWED_REPORT_TYPES, true)) {
            return $type;
        }
        return 'detailed';
    }

    /**
     * Produce a human-readable description of applied filters.
     */
    private function describeFilters(array $filters): array
    {
        $description = [];

        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $description['date_from'] = $filters['date_from'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $description['date_to'] = $filters['date_to'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $description['status'] = $filters['status'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $description['category'] = $filters['category'];
        }
        if (isset($filters['min_amount'])) {
            $description['min_amount'] = $filters['min_amount'];
        }
        if (isset($filters['max_amount'])) {
            $description['max_amount'] = $filters['max_amount'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
            $description['user_id'] = $filters['user_id'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $description['search'] = $filters['search'];
        }
        if (!empty($filters['group_by'])) {
            $description['group_by'] = $filters['group_by'];
        }

        $description['sort_by'] = $filters['sort_by'];
        $description['sort_dir'] = $filters['sort_dir'];

        return $description;
    }

    /**
     * Export report data as CSV.
     *
     * @param array $reportData The report result from generateReport()
     * @return string CSV content
     */
    public function exportToCsv(array $reportData): string
    {
        if (empty($reportData['data'])) {
            return '';
        }

        $output = fopen('php://temp', 'r+');

        // Write header row
        $headers = array_keys($reportData['data'][0]);
        fputcsv($output, $headers);

        // Write data rows
        foreach ($reportData['data'] as $row) {
            fputcsv($output, $row);
        }

        rewind($output);
        $csv = stream_get_contents($output);
        fclose($output);

        return $csv;
    }
}


// ============================================================
// Usage Example / Controller
// ============================================================

/**
 * Example controller function that handles the dashboard request.
 * This would typically be called from your routing layer.
 */
function handleDashboardReportRequest(): void
{
    // Database connection setup
    $dsn = 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=admin_dashboard;charset=utf8mb4';
    $username = 'db_user';
    $password = 'db_password';

    $options = [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
    ];

    try {
        $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $username, $password, $options);
        $reporter = new AdminDashboardReporter($pdo);

        if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
            $report = $reporter->generateReport($_POST);

            // Check if CSV export was requested
            if (!empty($_POST['export']) && $_POST['export'] === 'csv') {
                $csv = $reporter->exportToCsv($report);
                header('Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8');
                header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="report_' . date('Y-m-d_His') . '.csv"');
                echo $csv;
                exit;
            }

            // Return JSON for AJAX requests
            if (
                !empty($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH'])
                && strtolower($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) === 'xmlhttprequest'
            ) {
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode($report, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);
                exit;
            }

            // Otherwise, pass $report to your template/view
            // renderView('dashboard/report', ['report' => $report]);
        }
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        // Log the error securely; do not expose details to the user
        error_log('Dashboard report error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        http_response_code(500);
        echo json_encode(['error' => 'An internal error occurred while generating the report.']);
        exit;
    }
}
